title: Supply Chain Manager - SpiceJet Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - SpiceJet Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
